vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn rộng lớn đầy kinh ngạc
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of capturing awe-inspiring vistas from mountain peaks, where the scale of nature feels truly overwhelming.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ/tráng lệ của kiến trúc
vocab.example: When traveling through Europe, I love taking pictures that highlight the architectural grandeur of ancient cathedrals.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô/trập trùng
vocab.example: The undulating hills of the countryside offer a rhythmic beauty that looks stunning in a well-composed photograph.

vocab.meaning: vẻ lộng lẫy của phong cảnh
vocab.example: No matter how many times I visit the bay, its scenic splendor never fails to provide new inspiration for my photography.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề/hiểm trở
vocab.example: I spent an entire afternoon photographing the rugged coastline, focusing on how the waves crashed against the jagged rocks.

vocab.meaning: đường chân trời thành phố (toàn cảnh các tòa nhà)
vocab.example: The neon lights reflecting off the river create a mesmerizing urban skyline that I find impossible not to photograph.

vocab.meaning: thảm thực vật xanh tốt/tươi mơn mởn
vocab.example: Capturing the deep greens of the lush vegetation after a rainstorm adds a vibrant layer of texture to my landscape shots.
The mirror-like reflection on the tranquil waters of the lake provided the perfect composition for my latest series of views.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất
vocab.example: We climbed to the rooftop to get an unobstructed view of the fireworks display over the city.

vocab.meaning: phông nền đầy kịch tính/ấn tượng
vocab.example: The dark, gathering storm clouds served as a dramatic backdrop for my photos of the old lighthouse.
